CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGARRD & SMITH LLP A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGARRD & SMITH L L P'S MOTION TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE WITH REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION RESPONSE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S VERIFIED RESPONSE TO REQUEST NO. 35 CONSTITUTES A STATEMENT OF COMPLIANCE WITH DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO PRODUCE PLAINTIFF'S SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH HARTFORD. HARTFORD FAILED TO ISSUE OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S JULY 2, 2010 LETTER STATING THAT UPON ENTRY OF COURT ORDER TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE, PLAINTIFF WOULD PRODUCE A COPY OF HIS SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT WITH HARTFORD. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE BY AUGUST 3, 2010, THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATED PROTECTIVE ORDER AGREED UPON BY THE PARTIES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE DONALD SULLIVAN. NOT REPORTED.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2011 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion Adn Motion To Compel Compliance With Request For Production Response
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made by Plantiff / Defendant. Tentative adopted.

DEFENDANT LEWIS BRISBOIS BISGARRD & SMITH L L P's Motion to Compel Compliance with Request for Production Response is granted. Plaintiff's verified response to Request No. 35 constitutes a statement of compliance with Defendant's request to produce Plaintiff's Settlement Agreement with Hartford. Hartford failed to issue objections to Plaintiff's July 2, 2010 letter stating that upon entry of court order to compel compliance, Plaintiff would produce a copy of his Settlement Agreement with Hartford. Plaintiff is ordered to produce by August 3, 2010, the Settlement Agreement pursuant to the Stipulated Protective Order agreed upon by the parties. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.
